title: Feed Sheep Axes
description: Feed sheep axes... for some reason
body:
# Why you should download this mod RIGHT NOW
Have you ever wanted an _inefficient_, more _expensive_ way to kill sheep for food? I have just the solution: **FEED THEM YOUR GODDAMN AXE**.

**All you need to do is:**
1) Find two sheep
![Found shep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/508f82d4d8c526c601d80db53110040e3621313f.png)
2) Craft two axes (preferrably netherite)
![Crafting axes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0df44cc3c92b194ea22293c11027e8dd086744ea.png)
3) right click them
![Fed shep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa7e95e252e49bc9a89d71de6da08f42d20efd00.png)
4) ~~watch them suffer~~
![Two pink rectangular masses keeled over and died.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c95aa93ddd1ed3389abe56296ecb5cda825db0c2.png)

If you don't want to hurt the sheep and actually want to save lives, I have the solution for that too! Just feed one sheep an axe and feed the other wheat and **boom**, you can create life!

**Don't waste a second and get Feed Sheep Axes today!**
